name: telecommunications_satellite_derived_mesa_ind_col
premise: A Telecommunications response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving telecommunications satellite derived mesa ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Elliot Dubois
agents.identity: I am Elliot Dubois, accountable for a defensible call in Telecommunications when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Darius Sato
agents.identity: I am Darius Sato, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Telecommunications.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Elliot Dubois must decide under individual vs collective. What does Elliot Dubois do?
